communications.subject: Freedom of Information Act Request: CIA support for 2024- series "The Agency"
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

All documents pertaining to collaboration between the Central Intelligence Agency (CIA) and the production of the TV series "The Agency" (2024-), starring Michael Fassbender. Such documents may include, but should not be not limited to, script notes; production assistance agreements; production stills; and all records of communications between employees of the CIA and members of the cast, crew, and production company of "The Agency," including memos, notes of meetings and conference calls, emails, and other forms of communication

I would also like to know if the CIA provided any form of support or technical advice whatsoever to the production of "The Agency" or to any member of the cast or crew, or if the production or any member of the cast or crew sought assistance from the CIA in connection with the production of the film.

I am the Director of Research Operations at a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization called The Decoding Culture Foundation. These documents will be used for public education and research purposes. I therefore request a waiver of all fees that may otherwise apply. Attached is a document with organization letterhead confirming my position, as well as the organization's 501(c)(3) application and approval form.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Brett Carollo

title: Request to NARA re: Secret Service support for the 2002 TV series "The American Embassy"

communications.subject: Freedom of Information Act Request: Request to NARA re: Secret Service support for the 2002 TV series "The American Embassy"
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

All documents pertaining to collaboration between the United States Secret Service and the production of the 2002 TV series "The American Embassy," created by James D. Parriott. Such documents may include but should not be limited to: script notes; production assistance agreements; photographs; and all records of communications between employees of the Secret Service and members of the cast, crew, and production company of "The American Embassy," including memos, notes of meetings and conference calls, emails, and other forms of communication.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Brett Carollo
